prompt: A dynamic anime action illustration of two young martial-arts women fighting inside a traditional Japanese-style wooden dojo. The left fighter is in the foreground, a black-haired girl with a neat bun tied by a yellow ribbon, wearing a sleeveless yellow Chinese kung fu tunic with black trim, loose black pants, and black cloth shoes. She is in a deep low stance on the wooden floor, one fist pulled back and the other punching forward, surrounded by bright red energy trails that arc around her body and sweep across the scene. Water splashes dramatically around her feet as if her movement skims through a shallow layer of water. The right fighter is airborne in the midground, a pale-skinned girl with light lavender hair in two round buns, wearing a short black-and-white cheongsam-inspired battle dress with gold trim, black sheer tights, and black shoes. She performs a flying side kick while a vivid blue energy spiral curls around her in a circular motion. The collision of force between them has cracked and exploded the wooden floor at center-right, with debris and wood fragments flying outward, while dust and smoke billow across the lower right corner. The dojo interior has exposed timber beams, tatami edging, shoji-style windows, and warm natural light entering from the left. Hang a wooden sign above them with the Chinese text 币安 vs OKX. Use a dramatic wide-angle composition, strong foreshortening, cinematic motion blur, intense speed lines, high-detail anime rendering, glossy highlights, clean line art, energetic combat choreography, and a polished poster-like finish. Add exactly 2 visible fighters, 1 overhead wooden sign, 1 cracked floor impact point, 1 red energy effect around the left fighter, and 1 blue energy effect around the right fighter. Optionally place a subtle watermark-like text at the lower right reading UM YouMind.
